title: galium scabrum
intro: Galium scabrum, also known as prickly bedstraw, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Galium scabrum include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Galium scabrum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and stems can also be used in salves and ointments for topical applications.
